summary: Daily note create/live edit and AI processed status
description: Make calendar days behave like Obsidian daily notes: clicking a missing day creates daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md, daily notes open in autosave edit mode, daily frontmatter tracks last_updated, and calendar shows AI processed status from ai_processed_at compared with last_updated.
acceptance: Clicking a missing calendar date creates and opens daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md; daily notes enter autosave edit mode immediately; saving daily source updates last_updated; calendar daily entries expose ai_processed_at/last_updated and render green processed marker when ai_processed_at >= last_updated; JSONL/Markdown tests pass.
verification: cargo test --workspace; npm run check; browser smoke

evidence.summary: Implemented Obsidian-like daily note workflow: create/open daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md from missing calendar day; daily markdown opens in autosave edit mode; daily writes stamp last_updated; file_browser exposes last_updated, ai_processed_at, and ai_processed_status; calendar renders note + AI processed markers with green only when ai_processed_at >= last_updated. Verification: cargo test -p mvv-core creates_daily_notes_and_tracks_ai_processed_status --test runtime_flow, npm run check, go validate, browser DOM smoke blank=false searchVisible=true cssHasProcessed=true setupNoError=true.
